key_learning: Server-side defaults.ts and aiService.ts need the same URL/fallback fixes as the frontend — Codex caught these in Phase 6 review; always grep server/ as well as src/
external_url_strategy: SVG data URI via encodeURIComponent for string-typed img fields; CSS gradient div for decorative img elements
codex_verdict: NEEDS_REVISION (4 issues: Google Fonts, server Unsplash URLs, server localQuiz ans:0, server chat fallback)

key_learning: Shared AI proxy pattern (App1 Node server as gateway for all 3 apps) keeps API key server-side and avoids VITE_ env leak. Zod v4 requires z.record(z.string(), z.unknown()) not z.record(z.unknown()). tsx test runner crashes on top-level import.meta.env — lazy-load env vars in a guarded helper instead.

sensorManager must skip robot port using both getActivePath() AND ARDUINO_PORT env var; recursive setTimeout beats setInterval for async polls to prevent overlap; always serialize writes to shared JSON files via promise chain
